altText: A bright yellow dandelion flower fully open
A dandelion flower with a big dark bee gathering pollen
A dandelion seen from behind, green bracts curling under the flower
A perfect dandelion wish-puff — a full globe of seed parachutes
A dandelion leaf rosette — jagged lion's-tooth edges at ground level
Toothed dandelion leaves spreading flat in the grass
Dandelions in bloom with their toothed leaves in the lawn
A tough dandelion patch blooming through a crack in the pavement
Dandelions flowering from the base of an old stone wall
